summary: Set 072 Session 4 of 4 (FINAL) -- synthesis + docs + release + dogfood + first external run + close. Ran on claude-opus-4-8/high. DELIVERED: (1) SYNTHESIS -- docs/verification-surface-strategy.md new section 8 (the provider x surface matrix instrument + the verification-only application mode; the honest correction that surface is NOT fully orthogonal to provider per the kick-the-orchestrator-tires field study; the equal-arms mode remains the ONLY RETIRE-evidence path with _arms_held_equal now actively refusing a matrix artifact; the consumer-handoff model -- canonical runs the verification, the target remediates from the report and never re-runs); ai_router/docs/pull-verifier.md Set 072 as-built section. (2) LESSON L-072-1 (an equal-arms A/B isolates its one variable and is structurally blind to that variable's INTERACTIONS; add a complementary matrix instrument and measure on real built targets -- never weaken the original control; cites L-069-2, L-066-1). (3) RELEASE -- ai_router 0.25.0 -> 0.26.0 (pyproject.toml + __version__); CHANGELOG [0.26.0] (folds in the previously-unreleased routedApiCalls-omitted change + the S4 aggregator fix below). PyPI release is OPERATOR-AUTHORIZED + tag-driven: the operator pushes tag v0.26.0 on a green-Test SHA per the publish runbook (CONTRIBUTING.md); not pushed by automation. (4) change-log.md (full set narrative incl. honest dogfood/harvester results). (5) NEXT-SET recommendation routed via route(task_type=analysis) -> s4-next-set-recommendation.md (gemini-pro): primary = a second external target (dabbler-platform) for cross-target provider x surface telemetry; alternative = the greenfield finding-power track. (6) CODE FIX (the one behavioral change this session, caught by the path-aware dogfood = the L-070-1 pattern): aggregate_remediation_reports / _raw_from_contributor now falls back to the parent finding's severity/category when a contributor omits them. A per-run remediation-report contributor's severity/category are schema-OPTIONAL (_validate_contributor accepts a contributor that omits them; the merged finding's severity is authoritative), so a VALID report whose contributor omitted severity was re-merged as unspecified and DOWN-RANKED in the backlog (a Major could sort below a Minor). Verified real (a corrupting direction reachable via a validator-accepted input -- NOT the S3 F1-style conservative/never-emitted shape that was correctly declined); the parent severity is the max across contributors so the fallback can only preserve, never under-state, the re-merged severity. +1 regression test (test_aggregate_preserves_severity_when_contributor_omits_it); CHANGELOG Fixed entry; remediation-backlog-schema.md note. DOGFOOD (pathAwareCritique: required; contractGate: advisory): (a) the path-aware-critique.json GATE ARTIFACT was produced by pull_critique (GPT-5.4 + Gemini-Pro, 2 distinct providers, gate validate_path_aware_critique_gate ok=True); GPT-5.4 caught the 1 real Major above (fixed), Gemini-Pro VERIFIED/0. (b) the NEW MATRIX MODE was run over this set's own diff (ea393eb..HEAD, push:openai x {pull:openai, pull:google}) -> dogfood/verification-matrix-report.json + remediation-report.{json,md}; it surfaced 4 Major findings ALL adjudicated non-substantive (F1/F2 = push meta-confusion misreading the elided 1.8MB diff input as an incomplete review response; F3 = by-design + correctly-attributed: CellTelemetry stamps the ACTUAL reported identity push_result.provider/model (dual_surface_verify.py:635) and the attestation also records requestedPushProvider/Model, so attribution is always correct and matrix divergence-without-raise is the spec's explicit non-goal -- context-gap; F4 = pull framing artifact from pointing the pull arm at the repo root so the repo name did not match a session-set slug). No new code defect from the matrix dogfood -> converged per L-070-1. (A transient first dogfood attempt hit an Anthropic 529 Overloaded on the push arm and SKIPPED both cells -- which demonstrated the L-067-1 producer-skip discipline: the run completed, recorded both SkippedCells, wrote valid empty reports; re-run with push:openai produced the findings above.) FIRST REAL EXTERNAL RUN on ../dabbler-access-harvester (the load-bearing acceptance check): ran the wrapper over the harvester set-018 change (c11038e..e17bd41) with the best-guess matrix push:anthropic x {pull:openai, pull:google} including the Gemini-pull-under-strong-framing cell -> harvester-run/verification-matrix-report.json + remediation-report.{json,md}. RESULT: the Gemini-pull cell (pull=google/gemini-2.5-pro) returned VERIFIED -- a verdict, NOT silence (PASSES the load-bearing check; consistent with Gemini-quiet-on-pull being a framing artifact now fixed by the strong framing). Per-cell telemetry present + complete (orchestrator anthropic/claude-opus-4-8, push & pull provider+model, both arms adversarial-devils-advocate, surfaces, diff size/shape, brokers none); both validate_matrix_report + validate_remediation_report round-trip. Both push arms (Anthropic) VERIFIED/0; the GPT-pull arm produced 1 Minor pull-only unkeyed META-finding (a complaint about prompt instruction tension -- not a harvester code defect), carried in the consolidated remediation report with provenance. SUITE: full pytest GREEN 2241 passed / 5 skipped (the 5 are the Set 069 S4 real-Podman-on-Windows by-design skips; +1 from this session's regression test over the 2240 baseline). VERIFICATION: routed_gate REQUIRED (blast-radius cross-artifact/shared-schema + multi-module {ai_router, docs, pyproject.toml} + breadth 20 files + build/CI/config pyproject.toml); routed session-verification to gpt-5-4 (cross-provider from the anthropic orchestrator), R1 ISSUES_FOUND with 1 finding (~$0.159): the L-072-1 lesson overclaimed 'closes the snippet-fittable-diff confound' where SS8 correctly qualifies it to large/cross-file diffs (an L-065-1 propagate-the-qualifier miss). Classified MINOR (doc-accuracy, no merge-decision/code impact, no plausible path to harm) -> per the Set 071 materiality discipline (Step 7) a Minor-only round is NON-BLOCKING / effectively VERIFIED; FIXED with the verifier's verbatim suggested wording and NOT re-verified (a confirming re-verify of a one-word doc qualifier is exactly the L-071-1 nit-churn the discipline forbids). s4-verification.md (raw R1) + s4-issues.json (the 1 Minor finding + its resolution) saved; s4-verification.md never edited. SET 072 FULLY DELIVERED + CLOSED.
